results.title: Radiation Therapy for Cervical Cancer: Executive Summary of an ASTRO Clinical Practice Guideline.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 32473857. 2020/07/01 00:00. PURPOSE: This guideline reviews the evidence and provides recommendations for 
the indications and appropriate techniques of radiation therapy (RT) in the 
treatment of nonmetastatic cervical cancer.
METHODS: The American Society for Radiation Oncology convened a task force to 
address 5 key questions focused on the use of RT in definitive and postoperative 
management of cervical cancer. These questions included the indications for
